question: Will Colbert be forced off air before May, 2026?
resolution_criteria: CBS has announced that 'The Late Show with Stephen Colbert' will conclude in May 2026. However, Colbert's intensified criticism of President Trump and CBS's desire to appease Trump have led to speculation about an earlier termination. This market resolves to 'Yes' if CBS officially ends 'The Late Show with Stephen Colbert' before May 1, 2026. Official announcements from CBS or reputable news outlets will serve as resolution sources.
